### LAW 5: CROSS-ENVIRONMENT PURITY — ZERO LOCALHOST CONTAMINATION
Code works in ALL environments (local dev, Cloudflare edge, Google Cloud, Colab burst). Localhost references that leak to production are **security incidents**.
No hardcoded `localhost`, no hardcoded ports, no ngrok/tunnel references, no `127.0.0.1`, no machine-specific file paths. All URLs from env-based config.
- **Never reference localhost in any non-dev file.** All URLs from environment configuration. LAW-05.
